title: Configuration
description: Configuration library for easy config management
body:
Configuration

Lightweight configuration library which aims to streamline config creation between various mod loaders while being user friendly. Each configuration comes with procedurally generated UI for editing. For developers there are many attributes which allow you to handle common cases such as synchronization to users or for example requiring game restart before applying modified config

Wiki

User Guide
Developer Guide

Discord

Do you need help? You can join our Discord server and ask there

Bug reporting / Feature Requests

If you found any issue regarding this mod or have new feature idea, please create issue on GitHub for that. You can follow the Issues tab on this page
